name_en: Dr. João Paulo de Oliveira Street
name_local: Dr. João Paulo de Oliveira Street

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find traditional ceramics
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar cerâmica tradicional local?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR seh-RAHN-mee-kuh truh-dee-seeoo-NAHL loo-KAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Nazaré ceramics feature blue and white maritime motifs.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na Loja de Artesanato local, eles indicam o caminho.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH LAW-zhuh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too loo-KAHL, EH-lihsh een-DEE-kuhng AW kuh-MEE-nyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the local craft shop, they will direct you.

responses.english: Ask at the local craft shop, they will direct you.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH LAW-zhuh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too loo-KAHL, EH-lihsh een-DEE-kuhng AW kuh-MEE-nyoo.
responses.french: Pergunte na Loja de Artesanato local, eles indicam o caminho.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fishing net displays are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as redes de pesca expostas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH REH-dihsh DIH PEHSH-kuh ehsh-POHSH-tuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Xávega nets are traditional fishing gear dried publicly.

likely_response.local: As redes estão na Loja de Artesanato local.
likely_response.pronunciation: UHSH REH-dihsh ihsh-TOWN NUH LAW-zhuh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: The nets are at the local craft shop.

responses.english: The nets are at the local craft shop.
responses.phonetic: UHSH REH-dihsh ihsh-TOWN NUH LAW-zhuh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too loo-KAHL.
responses.french: As redes estão na Loja de Artesanato local.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the lighthouse viewpoint
phrases.text_local: Como chegar ao miradouro do farol?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo shih-GAHR OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO fuh-RAWL?
phrases.cultural_note: The viewpoint offers panoramic views of the famous giant waves.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na loja de artesanato local.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH LAW-zhuh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the local craft shop.

responses.english: Ask at the local craft shop.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH LAW-zhuh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too loo-KAHL.
responses.french: Pergunte na loja de artesanato local.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the municipal fish market is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o mercado municipal de peixe?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL DIH PAY-shih?
phrases.cultural_note: The market sells fresh daily catch from local fishermen.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Peixeira municipal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-SHAY-ruh moo-nee-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the municipal fish market.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the municipal fish market.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pay-SHAY-ruh moo-nee-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Peixeira municipal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where traditional ceramics shops are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as lojas de cerâmica tradicional?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH LOH-zhuhsh DIH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh truh-dee-seeoo-NAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Nazaré is known for traditional ceramics; these shops are often family-run and display colorful, hand-painted pottery.

likely_response.local: Na Rua Dr. João Paulo de Oliveira.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH ROOUH dohw-TOHR. ZHOOOWN POW-loo DIH aw-lee-VAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: On Dr. João Paulo de Oliveira Street.

responses.english: On Dr. João Paulo de Oliveira Street.
responses.phonetic: NUH ROOUH dohw-TOHR. ZHOOOWN POW-loo DIH aw-lee-VAY-ruh.
responses.french: Na Rua Dr. João Paulo de Oliveira.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar lojas de cerâmica tradicional?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR LOH-zhuhsh DIH seh-RAHN-mee-kuh truh-dee-seeoo-NAHL?

likely_response.local: Procure na Peixeira municipal market ou na Loja de Artesanato local.
likely_response.pronunciation: proo-KOO-rih NUH pay-SHAY-ruh moo-nee-see-PAHL muh-ruh-KEHTSH OHW NUH LAW-zhuh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too loo-KAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Look at the Peixeira municipal market or the local craft shop.

responses.english: Look at the Peixeira municipal market or the local craft shop.
responses.phonetic: proo-KOO-rih NUH pay-SHAY-ruh moo-nee-see-PAHL muh-ruh-KEHTSH OHW NUH LAW-zhuh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too loo-KAHL.
responses.french: Procure na Peixeira municipal market ou na Loja de Artesanato local.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the lighthouse viewpoint
phrases.text_local: Scusi, como se chega ao Miradouro do Farol?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, KOH-moo SIH SHEH-guh OW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO fuh-RAWL?
phrases.cultural_note: The Miradouro do Farol offers panoramic views of Nazaré and the Atlantic. Locals often direct visitors via the main street or the funicular nearby.

likely_response.local: Siga reto até o final da rua.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh REH-too uh-TEH AW fee-NAHL DUH ROOUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Go straight to the end of the street.

responses.english: Go straight to the end of the street.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh REH-too uh-TEH AW fee-NAHL DUH ROOUH.
responses.french: Siga reto até o final da rua.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the municipal fish market is
